description: Extend STRUCT_LEVEL_ALIASES and DOOR_LEVEL_ALIASES with Level 11-20, German 7.OG-15.OG, special high-rise floors (Sky Lobby/Transfer Floor/Podium/Plant Floor/Observation Deck/Roof Terrace). Add industrial/warehouse room seeds (WAREHOUSE/LOADING/DOCK/PRODUCTION/ASSEMBLY/MANUFACTURING/FABRICATION/SHIPPING/PLANT/BOILER). Add hospitality seeds (GUEST/SUITE/BALLROOM/BANQUET/SPA/BAR/RESTAURANT). Add retail seeds (SALES/SHOWROOM/MERCHANDISE/STOCKROOM). AC20_Institute rooms 80/82 (0.9983). All others F1=1.0. Overall F1=0.9998 — essentially maintains F1=1.0 while generalising to high-rise towers, warehouses, factories, hotels, and retail.
